---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-section">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-photo">
      <img src="images/profile.jpg"
           alt="Pandelis Perakakis"
           class="profile-photo">
    </div>
    <div class="hero-text">
      <h1 class="hero-name">Pandelis Perakakis</h1>
      <p class="hero-title">Associate Professor of Psychology</p>
      <p class="hero-affiliation">Complutense University of Madrid<br>
      Dept. of Social, Work and Differential Psychology</p>
      <p class="hero-bio">
        I am an associate professor of psychology at the Complutense University of Madrid,
        teaching Individual Differences. My research encompasses human psychophysiology and
        affective science, with a particular interest in affect shift dynamics and their
        significance for psychological well-being.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-links">
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9130-3247" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-globe"></i> ORCID
        </a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=5S-EVSAAAAAJ" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Google Scholar
        </a>
        <a href="https://github.com/perakakis" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://x.com/ppandelis" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> X
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pandelis-perakakis-1369402a/" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
